experiment_11.Task: Reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy and validate the reproduction against paper-reported results.
experiment_11.Prompt: Use the attached manifests to reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy. Recreate the relevant comparisons from the paper, validate the reproduced results against the published summaries, and report one Santana correlation metric, one Wang differential-expression count, one SCF1 fold-change value, and the identifier-mapping method you used.
